description:
Implement the scope-completion review pass that runs after integrated validation passes.

## What to implement

After validation passes at quiescent scope completion:
1. Build a scope-review prompt containing:
   - Epic/scope description and goal
   - List of all verified tickets with their attributed commit SHAs and one-line messages
   - Validation output (pass confirmation)
   - Any coordination notes from the run
2. Launch a scope-complete reviewer (same agent infrastructure as per-worker review)
3. Reviewer uses its own tools to inspect code — prompt stays small
4. Findings are triaged by coordinator:
   - **`fix`**: Create a follow-up beadwork task (child of epic), with finding/rationale/related tickets/commits; launch a new worker when safe
   - **`file`**: Create follow-up work without blocking the completed scope
   - **`reject`**: Discard as invalid feedback
5. Previously verified worker records STAY verified — scope-level findings create NEW work
6. If `fix` work is created, scope is not complete — loop continues
7. Cap scope-level fix iterations at 2 rounds; if not converged → `attention`

## Design Rules

- This is NOT a re-review of every patch — it's a goal-verification gate
- Reviewer checks: epic goals met? attribution gaps? clean integrated validation? orphaned/contradictory changes?
- `fix` findings become beadwork children, NOT worker-level remediation re-openings
- Scope review is fix-forward: verified workers stay verified
- For standalone `/bw delegate <ticket>`: NO scope review beyond normal worker-completion review
- Same provider/model/timeout config as per-worker review

## Tests

- Scope review runs after validation passes at quiescence
- Scope review findings create beadwork child tasks (fix-forward)
- `fix` findings launch new workers and loop continues
- `file` findings create tasks without blocking
- `reject` findings discarded
- Previously verified workers NOT reopened
- 2-round cap enforced; not converged → `attention`
- Standalone delegate does NOT trigger scope review
- Scope review prompt contains epic context and all verified ticket summaries

## Definition of Done

- Scope-completion review pass implemented
- Fix-forward work creation works
- Loop correctly continues/stops based on scope findings
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean

comments.text: Implemented scope-completion review gate for current-branch quiescent completion: builds evidence/prompt, launches reviewer via existing reviewer command path, triages fix/file/reject findings into fix-forward child tasks without mutating verified workers, deduplicates by finding signature, and routes to attention after two fix rounds. Validation passing: lint/test/typecheck for @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension.

title: Implement scope-completion review with fix-forward work creation
